mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members ( user_id, password, email, name, birth_date, gender, phone, address, point_balance, role, status, joinDate ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{password}, #{email}, #{name}, #{birth_date}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{point_balance}, #{role}, #{status}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET password = #{password}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
